title: rhododendron subuliferum
intro: Rhododendron subuliferum is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the heath family and is native to the Himalayas. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and acting as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of Rhododendron subuliferum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
